name: instrument-of-state
description: Governed execution based on 元 / 组织镜像 / 节奏 / 意图放大 + 发牌 doctrine layer; Three Departments + Six Ministries is the external metaphor, meta-unit doctrine is the internal spine. v0.6.0 introduces iostate:* semantic aliases (古风 names stay as learning-side), stage-board + tool-trace visibility skills, skipPolicy/preemptPolicy cadence gates, 10-field intentPacket superposition.
